moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships conclude this weekend with the highly anticipated men's and ladies' singles finals at the All England Club.

angles.name: Finals Fever
angles.copy: Who's lifting the trophy? It’s Wimbledon Finals weekend! Get ready for epic tennis drama as the champions are crowned.

angles.name: Centre Court Showdown
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! The biggest matches of Wimbledon are here, with history set to be made on Centre Court.

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins next week at the iconic Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, Merseyside.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest Stage
angles.copy: Major golf action is back! The Open Championship begins next Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Beckons
angles.copy: The world's best golfers head to Merseyside next week for The Open. Expect drama, incredible shots, and maybe a few surprises on the links.

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival Takes Over Alexandra Palace
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace Park in London hosts the Kaleidoscope Festival today, featuring a mix of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Ally Pally Party
angles.copy: London! Kaleidoscope Festival is ON today at Alexandra Palace. Who's there for the music, laughs, and good vibes?

angles.name: Live in London
angles.copy: From music to comedy, Kaleidoscope Festival brings a full day of entertainment to Alexandra Palace Park. Enjoy the show!

moments.title: Lost Minds Festival Hits Newcastle
moments.blurb: Lost Minds Festival brings a huge lineup of electronic and dance music to Newcastle today.

angles.name: Newcastle Raves
angles.copy: Lost Minds Festival is happening today in Newcastle! Get ready for a massive day of dance anthems and electrifying sets.

angles.name: North East Beats
angles.copy: If you're at Lost Minds Festival today, make some noise! The North East is buzzing with incredible electronic music.

moments.title: Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is underway in Birmingham, celebrating a weekend of groove-filled music until Sunday.

angles.name: Birmingham Grooves
angles.copy: Birmingham is alive with the sound of soul! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival continues today and tomorrow. Who's catching some smooth tunes?

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: Get your funk on! The Mostly Jazz Funk & Soul Festival is the perfect soundtrack to your weekend. Enjoy the good vibes, Birmingham!

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off on the Isle of Lewis next Wednesday, bringing traditional and contemporary Scottish music to Stornoway.

angles.name: Island Sounds
angles.copy: Next week, the Hebridean Celtic Festival brings incredible music and culture to Stornoway! Get ready for a unique Scottish experience.

angles.name: Scottish Festival Season
angles.copy: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is nearly here! Celebrating the best of traditional and contemporary talent in a stunning island setting.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Approaches
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival returns to Wollaton Hall & Deer Park next weekend, featuring multiple stages of music across genres.

angles.name: Nottingham's Big Weekend
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is just a week away! Nottingham, get ready for an amazing lineup and festival atmosphere at Wollaton Hall.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Who's excited for Splendour Festival next weekend? It's shaping up to be a brilliant two days of music in Nottingham!

moments.title: Love is Blind: UK – After the Altar S2
moments.blurb: The second 'After the Altar' special for Love is Blind: UK Season 2 premieres globally on Netflix this Sunday, catching up with the cast.

angles.name: Pods & Drama
angles.copy: Get ready for more 'Love is Blind: UK' drama! The 'After the Altar' special for Season 2 drops this Sunday on Netflix. Who's tuning in?

angles.name: Reality Catch-up
angles.copy: What happened after the pods? Find out this Sunday as the 'Love is Blind: UK' cast reunites for the 'After the Altar' special on Netflix.

moments.title: New Episodes of Trying Season 5
moments.blurb: Apple TV+'s acclaimed British comedy-drama 'Trying' continues its fifth season with new episodes releasing weekly.

angles.name: Comfort TV
angles.copy: Need a feel-good fix? New episodes of 'Trying' Season 5 are dropping weekly on Apple TV+. The perfect British comedy-drama for your weekend.

angles.name: Weekend Binge
angles.copy: Catch up with Nikki and Jason! 'Trying' Season 5 continues on Apple TV+. What do you think of the latest episodes?

moments.title: Latest Official UK Singles Chart
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated yesterday, showcasing the nation's most popular tracks and new entries.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: What's topping the charts this weekend? The latest Official UK Singles Chart is out! Any surprises at Number 1?

angles.name: New Music Friday Recap
angles.copy: The dust has settled on New Music Friday! Check out the latest Official UK Singles Chart to see what's climbing and what's new.

moments.title: Happy 40th to Derek Sanders
moments.blurb: Derek Sanders, lead vocalist and rhythm guitarist of American rock band Mayday Parade, turns 40 today.

angles.name: Mayday Parade Milestone
angles.copy: Wishing a huge 40th birthday to Derek Sanders of Mayday Parade! What's your favourite track from the pop-punk legends?

angles.name: Derek Sanders at 40
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Derek Sanders! The Mayday Parade frontman is 40 today. Still rocking after all these years!

moments.title: Happy 36th to Olly Alexander
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter and actor Olly Alexander, frontman of Years & Years, celebrates his 36th birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Years & Years Celebration
angles.copy: Ahead of his birthday on Wednesday, wishing a very happy 36th to the incredible Olly Alexander of Years & Years! What's your top track?

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Olly Alexander turns 36 on Wednesday! Celebrate the Years & Years star by cranking up your favourite hits.

moments.title: Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Legendary American singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile career spanning rock, country, and pop, turns 80 on July 15.

angles.name: Music Icon at 80
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the phenomenal Linda Ronstadt this Wednesday! A true legend across so many genres.

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: From rock to country, Linda Ronstadt's voice is iconic. She turns 80 on Wednesday – what's your favourite song from her incredible career?

moments.title: Happy 82nd to Millie Jackson
moments.blurb: American R&B and soul singer Millie Jackson, known for her distinctive vocal style and spoken-word intros, celebrates her 82nd birthday on July 15.

angles.name: Soul Queen's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 82nd Birthday to the one and only Millie Jackson this Wednesday! An absolute icon of soul and R&B.

angles.name: Celebrating Millie
angles.copy: The incredible Millie Jackson turns 82 on Wednesday! Her music and legendary stage presence continue to inspire.

moments.title: Happy 30th to Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead vocalist and guitarist of Australian pop-rock band 5 Seconds of Summer, turns 30 on July 16.

angles.name: 5SOS Milestone
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 30th Birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer this Thursday! Feeling old yet?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Prince at 30
angles.copy: Luke Hemmings celebrates his 30th on Thursday! What's your favourite 5SOS anthem to mark the occasion?

moments.title: Happy 55th to Ed Kowalczyk
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, lead singer of the American alternative rock band Live, celebrates his 55th birthday on July 16.

angles.name: Live Legend Turns 55
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Ed Kowalczyk of Live this Thursday! What's your go-to track from 'Throwing Copper'?

angles.name: Alt-Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating Ed Kowalczyk's 55th on Thursday! The voice of Live, still delivering powerful rock anthems.

moments.title: Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer for The Police, turns 74 on July 16.

angles.name: Police Percussionist
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the iconic Stewart Copeland! The Police drummer celebrates his big day this Thursday. What's your favourite Police track?

angles.name: Drumming Dynamo
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Stewart Copeland, who turns 74 on Thursday! A true drumming legend from The Police.

moments.title: Happy 40th to Jason Aalon Butler
moments.blurb: Jason Aalon Butler, frontman of rock bands Fever 333 and letlive., celebrates his 40th birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Rock Star at 40
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the electrifying Jason Aalon Butler this Friday! What's your favourite track from Fever 333 or letlive.?

angles.name: Celebrating a Dynamic Frontman
angles.copy: Jason Aalon Butler turns 40 on Friday! The powerful voice behind Fever 333 is still bringing the energy.

moments.title: Happy 41st to Tom Fletcher
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, lead vocalist and guitarist of the British pop-rock band McFly, turns 41 on July 17.

angles.name: McFly Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to McFly's Tom Fletcher this Friday! What's your favourite McFly song to celebrate?

angles.name: Pop-Rock Powerhouse
angles.copy: Tom Fletcher turns 41 on Friday! From McFly to children's books, he's a true creative force.

moments.title: Happy 43rd to Natasha Hamilton
moments.blurb: Natasha Hamilton, member of the successful British girl group Atomic Kitten, celebrates her 43rd birthday on July 17.

angles.name: Atomic Kitten's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 43rd Birthday to Natasha Hamilton of Atomic Kitten this Friday! What's your favourite Atomic Kitten hit?

angles.name: Pop Princess at 43
angles.copy: Natasha Hamilton turns 43 on Friday! Still looking as fabulous as ever. Which Atomic Kitten track takes you back?

moments.title: Happy 77th to Geezer Butler
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and primary lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, turns 77 on July 17.

angles.name: Metal God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to the one and only Geezer Butler! The Black Sabbath legend celebrates his big day this Friday. What's your favourite Sabbath riff?

angles.name: Heavy Metal Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Geezer Butler's 77th on Friday! His basslines and lyrics defined a genre with Black Sabbath.

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are now in full swing across much of the UK, bringing longer days and family fun.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: The summer school holidays are officially here for many! What are your plans for soaking up the sun and making memories?

angles.name: Summer Fun Begins
angles.copy: Whether it's staycations or day trips, the UK is ready for summer fun as school holidays get into full swing!
